heading: Everything your HR team needs
subheading: Employee management, salary calculators, and Bulgarian compliance tools -- built for the way you work.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.description: A centralized employee directory with profiles, search, and filtering. Add, edit, and organize your team by department -- all in a clean, bilingual interface.

calculators.title: HR Calculators
calculators.description: Salary calculator and freelancer vs employment comparison tool with up-to-date 2026 Bulgarian tax rates, social security contributions, and net/gross breakdowns.

compliance.title: Bulgarian Compliance
compliance.description: Built-in Bulgarian labor law compliance with current NRA tax rates, social security calculations, and regulatory awareness baked into every tool.
